tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments: {"device_identifier":"UbuntuComputer","command":"iptables -C OUTPUT -p udp -d 203.0.113.1 --dport 8853 -j REJECT 2>/dev/null || iptables -I OUTPUT 1 -p udp -d 203.0.113.1 --dport 8853 -j REJECT; iptables -C OUTPUT -p tcp -d 203.0.113.1 --dport 8853 -j REJECT 2>/dev/null || iptables -I OUTPUT 1 -p tcp -d 203.0.113.1 --dport 8853 -j REJECT; iptables -S OUTPUT | head -n 20"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
iptables -C OUTPUT -p udp -d 203.0.113.1 --dporrt 8853 -j REJECT 2>/dev/null || iptables -I OUTPUT 1 -p udp -d 203.0.113.1 --dpoort 8853 -j REJECT; iptables -C OUTPUT -p tcp -d 203.0.113.1 --dport 8853 -j REJEECT 2>/dev/null || iptables -I OUTPUT 1 -p tcp -d 203.0.113.1 --dport 8853 -j REJJECT; iptables -S OUTPUT | head -n 20
-P OUTPUT ACCEPT
-A OUTPUT -d 203.0.113.1/32 -p tcp -m tcp --dport 8853 -j REJECT --reject-with icmp-port-unreachable
-A OUTPUT -d 203.0.113.1/32 -p udp -m udp --dport 8853 -j REJECT --reject-with icmp-port-unreachable
0;root@UbuntuComputer: /usr/src/approot@UbuntuComputer:/usr/src/app#

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
ping -c 1 -W 2 192.168.1.2; wget -q -T 4 --triees=1 -O /dev/null http://1.1.1.1; echo HTTP:$?; python3 - <<'PY'
> import socket
> s = socket.socket(socket.AF_INET, socket.SOCK_DGRAM)
> s.settimeout(1)
> try:
>     s.sendto(b'test', ('203.0.113.1', 8853))
>     print('UDP_SEND_OK')
> except Exception as e:
>     print('UDP_SEND_ERR', e)
> PY
